records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't feel too good...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't feel too good...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't feel too good...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hear voices in my head... Must... become one...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hear voices in my head... Must... become one...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hear voices in my head... Must... become one...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The feast of knowledge has been prepared. The banquet has started.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The feast of knowledge has been prepared. The banquet has started.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The feast of knowledge has been prepared. The banquet has started.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The host of the feast has arrived. The monarch has arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The host of the feast has arrived. The monarch has arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The host of the feast has arrived. The monarch has arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone who tried to run away... is distorted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone who tried to run away... is distorted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone who tried to run away... is distorted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They had Qlipha Imaginary Energy forcibly injected into their bodies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They had Qlipha Imaginary Energy forcibly injected into their bodies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They had Qlipha Imaginary Energy forcibly injected into their bodies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those who aren't suitable all turn into Remains.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those who aren't suitable all turn into Remains.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those who aren't suitable all turn into Remains.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And for those people, a phenomenon called <color=#ffd34c>data corruption</color> also occurs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And for those people, a phenomenon called <color=#ffd34c>data corruption</color> also occurs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And for those people, a phenomenon called <color=#ffd34c>data corruption</color> also occurs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When data corruption occurs on a target, all information that existed about the target is erased and distorted.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: When data corruption occurs on a target, all information that existed about the target is erased and distorted.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: When data corruption occurs on a target, all information that existed about the target is erased and distorted.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: As if that person had never existed in the first place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As if that person had never existed in the first place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As if that person had never existed in the first place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Data corruption... Maybe that's why I can't remember my father...?94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: Data corruption... Maybe that's why I can't remember my father...?94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: Data corruption... Maybe that's why I can't remember my father...?94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: This way! The Remains are gathering over here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This way! The Remains are gathering over here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This way! The Remains are gathering over here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That voice...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That voice...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That voice...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think I've heard it somewhere before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think I've heard it somewhere before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think I've heard it somewhere before.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I can
8kt be certain, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I can
8kt be certain, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I can
8kt be certain, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the darkness in your mind blinds your vision...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the darkness in your mind blinds your vision...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the darkness in your mind blinds your vision...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's our duty to purify it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's our duty to purify it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's our duty to purify it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go. I'm an expert when it comes to paving roads.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go. I'm an expert when it comes to paving roads.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go. I'm an expert when it comes to paving roads.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you recognize the voice, I'm sure that person has some correlation with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you recognize the voice, I'm sure that person has some correlation with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you recognize the voice, I'm sure that person has some correlation with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know you're thinking that he could be your father, so you don't have to be so careful around me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know you're thinking that he could be your father, so you don't have to be so careful around me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know you're thinking that he could be your father, so you don't have to be so careful around me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're right. I was thinking that he could be my father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're right. I was thinking that he could be my father.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're right. I was thinking that he could be my father.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're exposed to Corruption rays for a long time, do you gain insight to know what other people are thinking?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're exposed to Corruption rays for a long time, do you gain insight to know what other people are thinking?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're exposed to Corruption rays for a long time, do you gain insight to know what other people are thinking?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or did you use your Counter ability to get inside my head?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or did you use your Counter ability to get inside my head?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or did you use your Counter ability to get inside my head?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Erm... I'm sorry for thinking that you were untrustworthy in the head! So, please stop reading my mind!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Erm... I'm sorry for thinking that you were untrustworthy in the head! So, please stop reading my mind!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Erm... I'm sorry for thinking that you were untrustworthy in the head! So, please stop reading my mind!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. Well, I can't read minds, but I now know what you thought of me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. Well, I can't read minds, but I now know what you thought of me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. Well, I can't read minds, but I now know what you thought of me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh... I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh... I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh... I'm sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand where you're coming from.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I understand where you're coming from.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand where you're coming from.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone wants to go look for their family when they can't see them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone wants to go look for their family when they can't see them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone wants to go look for their family when they can't see them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It might be kind of awkward to say this to you now, but I know more about you than you think.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It might be kind of awkward to say this to you now, but I know more about you than you think.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It might be kind of awkward to say this to you now, but I know more about you than you think.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What I can tell you right now is maybe your name?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What I can tell you right now is maybe your name?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What I can tell you right now is maybe your name?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it... So you can read minds...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it... So you can read minds...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it... So you can read minds...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know it might be a little frustrating, but bear with me here.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know it might be a little frustrating, but bear with me here.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know it might be a little frustrating, but bear with me here.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: Data corruption is difficult for others to resolve it for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Data corruption is difficult for others to resolve it for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Data corruption is difficult for others to resolve it for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: First, let's get going. Shouldn't you quench your curiosity?
records.m_Talk_DEU: First, let's get going. Shouldn't you quench your curiosity?
records.m_Talk_FRA: First, let's get going. Shouldn't you quench your curiosity?
